app.title: timelapse-gif Web
app.pageTitle: timelapse-gif – Create Timelapse GIFs from Image Sequences

dropzone.title: Upload Images
dropzone.description: Drag & drop or click to select

steps.step1Desc: Drag & drop photos or add via folder / ZIP
steps.step2Desc: Configure size, speed, date overlay, and more
steps.step3Desc: Create and download your timelapse GIF in one click

items.a: It's a web tool that lets you easily create timelapse GIFs from multiple images. Everything from uploading images to generating and downloading the GIF happens right in your browser.

items.q: Are my uploaded images stored on a server?
items.a: No. All image processing happens entirely in your browser. Your uploaded images are never sent to any server.
Major image formats such as JPEG and PNG are supported. You can also upload multiple images at once via ZIP files or folders.

items.q: Can I customize the GIF settings?
items.a: Yes. You can adjust the width, duration per frame, date overlay visibility, font size, and more.

sections.heading: Data Collection
sections.body: This service does not send or store any personal data on our servers, including images you upload. All image processing happens entirely within your browser.

sections.heading: Cookies & Local Storage
sections.body: We use browser local storage to save your language preference. We do not use any tracking cookies.

sections.heading: Third-Party Sharing
sections.body: This service does not share any user information with third parties.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: If you have any questions about our privacy practices, please reach out via the Contact page.

sections.heading: Service Overview
sections.body: This service provides a free web tool for creating timelapse GIFs from images.

sections.heading: Disclaimer
sections.body: This service is provided "as is." We make no guarantees regarding the quality of generated GIFs or the results of their use.

sections.heading: Prohibited Activities
sections.body: Processing illegal content, unauthorized access to the service, and any other activities that violate applicable laws are prohibited.

sections.heading: Changes to Terms
sections.body: These terms may be updated without prior notice. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
